overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic urban promenade in Night City. The perspective transitions from first-person to third-person following a character with a mohawk who stops at a vending machine before turning back. The scene features bright sunlight, holographic advertisements, elevated walkways, and moderate pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban promenade with elevated walkways

agents.ego_description: walking along a futuristic city sidewalk in first-person perspective, observing holographic advertisements and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: multi-level futuristic bridge structure with glass and steel construction spanning across the street
distinctive orange curved architectural canopy structure with ribbed design
large floating holographic advertisement displaying product imagery above the street
sleek black futuristic car parked along the curb
tall blue metallic street lamp with modern design

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person walk along a sunlit futuristic city promenade. The camera moves steadily forward past a parked futuristic vehicle and blue street lamps, toward an elevated walkway bridge. An distinctive orange arched structure stands on the right while holographic billboards float overhead. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves in both directions along the wide concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza area with escalators and vending machines

events.description: camera perspective switches from first-person to third-person following a character with a mohawk

agents.ego_description: following closely behind a character wearing a brown leather jacket and distinctive mohawk hairstyle as they navigate the promenade

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the camera toward a vending machine area

entered.detail: green and orange outdoor escalator system leading up to the elevated walkway
pair of dark vending machines with glowing screens under a small shelter
small kiosk with magazines and newspapers displayed on racks
large billboard displaying warriors text with motorcycle imagery

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a character with a mohawk and leather jacket. They walk along the promenade toward an escalator structure leading to an elevated walkway. The character passes by a news stand on the left and approaches a cluster of vending machines on the right. The orange arched structure and initial vehicles fall behind as new holographic advertisements come into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: vending machine shelter under elevated walkway

events.description: character stops walking and begins interacting with the braindance vending machine

agents.ego_description: standing stationary behind the character, observing their interaction with the vending machine

notable_agents.action: standing at a vending machine, seemingly selecting an item on the screen

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a pair of vending machines beneath the elevated walkway structure. The camera holds position as the character interacts with the machine, which displays glowing red interface elements. The surrounding area is partially shaded by the overhead structure, with reduced pedestrian traffic. The escalator and news stand from the previous segment are no longer visible as the camera focuses on the vending area.

events.description: character turns around and walks away from the vending machine, passing by the camera
camera falls in behind the character as they walk back along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: following the character as they walk away from the vending machine area and back along the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: walking away from the vending machines along the waterfront path, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: the same distinctive orange curved canopy now visible on the left side as the character walks back
black metal railing separating the walkway from the water's edge
tall palm trees lining the promenade ahead

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the vending machine and walks back along the promenade, passing the camera position. The camera follows from behind as they proceed along the waterfront path. The orange arched structure from the beginning of the video reappears now on the left side, while palm trees and a waterfront railing become visible ahead. The character continues walking away from the urban plaza back toward the open promenade area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a sunlit futuristic promenade that transitions from a first-person exploration into a third-person character study. It begins with a steady forward walk past parked vehicles and blue street lamps toward an elevated walkway, with holographic billboards floating above a wide concrete sidewalk. As the perspective shifts to follow a character with a mohawk and leather jacket, the camera moves past a news stand and toward a cluster of vending machines, leaving the initial orange arched structure behind. The scene then slows as the character stops to interact with a glowing red vending interface beneath the shade of the overhead walkway. Finally, the character turns and walks back along the waterfront path, passing the camera as the orange arch reappears on the left and the view opens up toward palm trees and a railing.
